benefits.description: Skin has never felt softer, thicker, healthier, and better overall

protocol_notes: Uses topical GHK-Cu as cosmetic grade powder mixed with hyaluronic acid (3% concentration) on problem areas (stomach, thighs, underside of arms); alternates application on body with bioil based on other skincare ingredients used; applies GHK-Cu serum on face morning and evening; avoids chemical sunscreens with zinc and vitamin C on days of GHK-Cu application due to copper interference
